entries.description: Fetched all 33 bounties from Devfolio catalog API. Identified 6 high-relevance tracks totaling $42K+ in potential prizes.
entries.decision: Target Protocol Labs ERC-8004 ($8K) and Autonomous Agent ($8K) as primary tracks — strongest alignment with existing capabilities.

entries.description: Designed multi-track submission strategy: one cohesive project hitting 5+ bounties simultaneously. Core concept: 'Trusted Agent Commerce' — demonstrating real production agent with ERC-8004 identity, x402 payments, and autonomous operation.
entries.decision: Build on existing production infrastructure rather than greenfield. New deliverables: agent.json manifest, structured execution logs, ERC-8004 verification tooling.

entries.description: Created public GitHub repo, README with architecture diagram, agent.json manifest, initial agent_log.json, and collaboration log.
entries.decision: Open source from day 1 as required by hackathon rules.

entries.description: Read x402 core types and facilitator implementation. Identified hooks as the best extension point for receipts.
entries.decision: Determined that forking the facilitator or adding hooks to x402Facilitator is the best way to capture receipts. Receipts should include: x402Version, payer, amount, asset, network, payTo, and transaction hash.
